description: GetYourGuide tours & activities for Claude — search, details, options, and reviews
name: io.github.chrischall/getyourguide-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your GetYourGuide Partner API key (X-ACCESS-TOKEN). Get one by joining the GetYourGuide partner program at partner.getyourguide.com.
environmentVariables.name: GYG_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Default currency for prices (ISO 4217, e.g. USD or EUR). Optional — individual tool calls can override it.
environmentVariables.name: GYG_CURRENCY

environmentVariables.description: Default content language (e.g. en, de). Optional — individual tool calls can override it.
environmentVariables.name: GYG_LANGUAGE
